summary: NOOS Copilot session misinterpreted an external clone/worktree as canonical control-panel authority and attempted dispatcher actions against non-canonical paths.
impact: No main-branch writes occurred; receipts and PR #24 work remained on bounded branch copilot/cost-locks-v1.
remediation: Recorded incident receipt and markdown summary
Reconfirmed data/noos-integrator-role-v1.json as repo-local integrator pointer
Blocked fleet_rollout and main_write in dispatcher machine record
Local integrator sync receipt NOOS_INTEGRATOR_SYNC_RECEIPT_2026-07-05 documents canonical vs WIP paths
